goal: Automatic graph digitization - upload image of chart/graph, extract data points automatically, export to CSV with adjustable point density

inputs.example: screenshot of line graph or chart

core_operations: manual axis calibration (click corners + enter axis values)
replot graph in different styles (line, bar, scatter, area)
detect multiple lines as separate series
style_brief: clean, modern, data-tool aesthetic - dark mode friendly, clear upload area, interactive graph preview
